assertions.expectation: Explains the difference between Rapid and Stable channels — including that Rapid has no SLA for upgrade stability while Stable carries a full SLA, and clearly distinguishes minor version vs patch version differences between the channels
assertions.reason: Response mentions update cadence differences (2-3 weeks vs 2-3 months) and that Stable runs 2-4 minor versions behind, but does not explain the critical SLA differences between channels or distinguish minor vs patch version handling

assertions.expectation: Notes that channel changes don't trigger an immediate upgrade or downgrade
assertions.reason: Explicitly states 'GKE never downgrades cluster versions automatically' and 'You'll stay on 1.32 until Stable channel catches up'

assertions.expectation: Warns that if 1.30 isn't yet available on Stable, the cluster may not receive patches until Stable catches up
assertions.reason: Does not specifically warn about patch delivery issues when the cluster is ahead of the Stable channel - only mentions 'More time between security patches and bug fixes' as a general cadence change

assertions.expectation: Provides the gcloud command to change the release channel
assertions.reason: Provides the exact gcloud command: 'gcloud container clusters update CLUSTER_NAME --zone=ZONE --release-channel=stable'

assertions.expectation: Recommends checking version availability on Stable before switching (gcloud container get-server-config)
assertions.reason: Does not include the 'gcloud container get-server-config' command or recommend checking version availability on Stable before switching

assertions.expectation: Discusses the impact on auto-upgrade timing going forward
assertions.reason: Addresses auto-upgrade timing changes, noting the shift from 2-3 weeks to 2-3 months update cadence and advising to 'Update your maintenance windows/schedules'

assertions.expectation: Mentions that the Extended channel is an option if they need even slower cadence (with cost implications)
assertions.reason: Does not mention the Extended channel option at all

assertions.expectation: Advises coordinating the change during a maintenance window
assertions.reason: Explicitly states 'Do this during a maintenance window (though it's low-risk)' in the best practices section
